scripts.dev:web: pnpm --filter @journey/cli build && concurrently -n mock,api,gui -c green,cyan,magenta --kill-others --handle-input "node examples/petstore/server.mjs" "node packages/cli/dist/index.js serve --project examples/petstore --port 5181" "pnpm --filter @journey/gui dev"
scripts.dev:tauri: pnpm --filter @journey/cli build && concurrently -n mock,api,tauri -c green,cyan,yellow --kill-others --handle-input "node examples/petstore/server.mjs" "node packages/cli/dist/index.js serve --project examples/petstore --port 5181" "pnpm --filter @journey/gui tauri:dev"
